An announcement from Fletcher Building Limited ( (FRCEF) ) is now available.

Fletcher Building Limited has announced that James Miller will officially commence his role as an independent non-executive director on June 1, 2025. This appointment is part of the company’s strategic efforts to strengthen its governance and leadership team, potentially impacting its operational and market positioning positively.

Fletcher Building Limited is a major player in the construction and building materials industry, providing a wide range of products and services primarily focused on infrastructure and residential development markets.

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from New Wave Esports ( (TSE:NWAI) ).

New Wave Holdings Corp. has announced the filing of a first amended and restated offering document for its non-brokered private placement of 7,000,000 units at $0.055 per unit, aiming to raise $385,000. The offering, which is made under the Listed Issuer Financing Exemption, is expected to close on or about May 30, 2025, with proceeds intended for future portfolio investments, current investments, and general working capital. This move is expected to enhance the company’s financial flexibility and support its strategic investments in innovative sectors.

More about New Wave Esports

New Wave Holdings Corp. is an investment issuer focused on supporting innovative and fast-growing companies within the esports, Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, and Web3 sectors.

data.title: Mirion Technologies Initiates $450M Refinancing Process
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

Mirion Technologies ( (MIR) ) has provided an announcement.

On May 29, 2025, Mirion Technologies initiated a refinancing process involving a $450 million tranche of replacement term loans. These loans are expected to mature in 2032 and will be used to refinance existing term loans under a previous credit agreement. The refinancing is anticipated to close in the second quarter of 2025, although its completion is subject to certain conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (MIR) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mirion Technologies stock, see the MIR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MIR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MIR is a Outperform.

Mirion Technologies achieves a solid overall score driven by strong technical momentum and strategic financial management, including robust earnings growth and a significant convertible notes offering. However, valuation concerns remain due to negative profitability metrics. Continued focus on achieving profitability and managing risks in certain segments will be crucial for future performance.

To see Spark’s full report on MIR stock, click here.

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

AA Mission Acquisition Corp. Class A ( (AAM) ) has shared an update.

On May 22, 2025, AA Mission Acquisition Corp. issued a $1,000,000 unsecured, convertible promissory note to AA Mission Acquisition Sponsor Holdco LLC. This note is set to be payable after the company completes its initial business combination and can be converted into units of the post-business combination entity. The conversion price is set at $10.00 per unit, with each unit comprising one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant.

The latest update is out from Miniluxe Holding Corp. ( (TSE:MNLX) ).

MiniLuxe Holding Corp. reported a 9% increase in revenue to $6.1 million and a 12% rise in gross profit to $2.5 million for Q1 2025, despite a slight increase in operating loss due to one-time expenses. The company continues to focus on strategic pillars such as expanding through partnerships, enhancing studio profitability, and improving cost efficiency, supported by a strong cash position and the successful extinguishment of convertible debt.

More about Miniluxe Holding Corp.

MiniLuxe Holding Corp. operates in the beauty and wellness industry, focusing on providing nail care services through its branded Core Studios and franchise locations. The company emphasizes growth through partnerships and franchise models, aiming to expand its talent revenue base and improve studio-level profitability.

ATS Corporation ( (TSE:ATS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ATS Corporation announced that its CEO, Andrew Hider, and CFO, Ryan McLeod, will participate in the Stifel 2025 Cross Sector Insight Conference in Boston on June 3, 2025. This participation includes hosting institutional investor meetings, highlighting ATS’s commitment to engaging with investors and showcasing its industry-leading automation solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ATS) stock is a Buy with a C$68.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ATS Corporation stock, see the TSE:ATS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ATS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ATS is a Neutral.

ATS Corporation demonstrates robust revenue growth and a strong order backlog, particularly in life sciences and food & beverage sectors. However, challenges such as a declining revenue trend, cash flow issues, and high valuation relative to earnings suggest caution. Technical indicators signal bearish momentum, and while strategic initiatives offer long-term promise, short-term risks like tariff impacts and transportation segment challenges cannot be overlooked. The stock is positioned for potential recovery with strategic execution and improved cash management.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ATS stock, click here.

More about ATS Corporation

ATS Corporation is a leading provider of automation solutions, serving multinational customers in industries such as life sciences, transportation, food & beverage, consumer products, and energy. Established in 1978, the company operates over 65 manufacturing facilities and 85 offices globally, employing more than 7,500 people. ATS is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange and the NYSE under the symbol ATS.

data.title: Truist Financial Appoints Jonathan Pruzan to Board
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Truist Financial ( (TFC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On May 27, 2025, Truist Financial Corporation appointed Jonathan Pruzan as a director of the company and a member of the Board of Directors of its subsidiary, Truist Bank. Pruzan, who brings 35 years of financial services experience, will serve on the Joint Risk Committee of the Boards. His extensive background includes roles at Morgan Stanley and Pretium, providing him with a wealth of knowledge in technology, operations, finance, and corporate strategy, which is expected to benefit Truist’s strategic direction and operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (TFC) stock is a Hold with a $48.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Truist Financial stock, see the TFC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TFC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TFC is a Neutral.

Truist Financial’s overall stock score reflects a company facing mixed financial signals. While there is some recovery in revenue and net income, operational inefficiencies and high leverage present significant challenges. The technical analysis suggests bearish momentum, while the valuation appears attractive due to a low P/E ratio and high dividend yield. The earnings call provides a balanced view with growth in loans and deposits but a reduced revenue outlook due to economic uncertainties. Overall, the stock presents a cautious investment opportunity with potential for income generation but requires careful monitoring of operational improvements and market conditions.

To see Spark’s full report on TFC stock, click here.

More about Truist Financial

Truist Financial Corporation is a purpose-driven financial services company headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina. It holds a leading market share in many high-growth markets in the U.S. and offers a wide range of products and services through its wholesale and consumer businesses, including consumer and small business banking, commercial and corporate banking, investment banking and capital markets, wealth management, payments, and specialized lending businesses. As of March 31, 2025, Truist is a top-10 commercial bank with total assets of $536 billion.

Average Trading Volume: 10,450,513

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $52.42B
